title: browser-use allowed_domains bypass via HTTP auth URL syntax
description: The _is_url_allowed method in BrowserContext extracts the domain from urlparse().netloc and splits on colon to strip the port, but netloc includes the user:password@ prefix. An attacker-controlled URL like https://allowed.com:pass@malicious.com bypasses the domain allowlist because split(':')[0] returns 'allowed.com' while the browser navigates to malicious.com.
